race.comment: Big field but the pressure should suit VERHOEVEN (6). Went back to the tail fresh and came from last to finish a nose second behind Wild Nights. Fitter and looks tough to stop again.  GEEGEES MERCEDES (11) was a maiden winner fresh then placed here last time. Going well and bold showing expected again. JUST PLAIN NUTS (1) was a close-up fourth on the synthetic at Devonport and will be much better for it. Will be handy and should go close. GEEGEES ACE (4) was a winner here two back then fifth at Devonport latest. Back to winning course and distance and gets chance to atone.THE PIRATE QUEEN (14) has had a lot of tries here but is rarely far away and is worth including.
